gate: PC2_GPU_ELIGIBLE only if (Phase4G_E4b >= partial) AND (>=3 preset-ready datasets) AND (stress_feasibility_pass) AND (PM_budget_approval)
blockers: Only 2 datasets have FBCSP-LGG channel + central_strip_v1 presets (BNCI2014_001, BNCI2015_001); >=3 required for a meaningful leave-one-dataset-out gate (4F/4G lesson). Add a preset+loader for one CANDIDATE (Cho2017 / Lee2019_MI / PhysionetMI) BEFORE PC2.
Phase 4G E4b repair scope not yet established (>= partial required).
if_phase4g_fails: PC2 stays PAUSED (does NOT auto-run); return for explicit PM review.

answers.q1_ge3_compatible_datasets: NO today (2 preset-ready); candidates exist (Cho2017/Lee2019/PhysionetMI/Weibo2014/Schirrmeister2017) but need preset+loader
answers.q2_same_fbcsp_lgg_refit_checkpoint: yes for the 2 preset-ready; a 3rd needs ch-preset + central_strip_v1 + loader added
answers.q3_induce_subject_class_hold_Py: yes (skew P(y|subject) at rho, complementary c_d holds global P(y))
answers.q6_gpu_budget: ~25-60 GPU-h for 2 datasets (FSR_23); ~35-90 GPU-h for >=3; scales with dataset count
